name.description: The name of the API key. The name must be 1-80 characters long.

roles.description: The roles to create the API key with. Default is `["ProjectEditor"]`.

items.description:
A role that can be assigned to an API key.
Possible values: `ProjectEditor`, `ProjectViewer`, `ControlPlaneEditor`, `ControlPlaneViewer`, `DataPlaneEditor`, or `DataPlaneViewer`.
